title: Pyro's Rainbow Dino Dogs
description: Dino costumes for dogs! Based on Pyropuncher.
body:
# Dino Suits for Dogs
Custom dog textures for Pyropuncher. Made with love for _Lil Smokey Weenie_.

Back in Mindcrack Season 4, Pyro had a custom texture pack to put his dinosaur outfit on the dogs. [This old reddit post by was the origin of it.](https://old.reddit.com/r/mindcrack/comments/1ln5wp/pyros_dogs/) Pyro used /u/Ningamer's textures, as you can see here in his old video: [Minecraft: Mindcrack S2E25 - Rainbow Dino Dog Army](https://youtu.be/J7ib9hszpD0?si=Dh_XGERz2_0isdh6&t=355)

I made my own updated version of this for dog armour. Pyro is using Faithful 32x at the moment, so I made both 32x32 and 16x16 versions.

## Links
### Pyro
[Pyropuncher - Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@Pyropuncher)

[Pyropuncher - Twitch.tv](https://www.twitch.tv/pyropuncher)
